message:
refactor: Comprehensive codebase improvements across analysis, UI, and tests

- Enhanced analysis module: config, cycle warnings, dependency suggestions,
  feedback, graph cycles, insights, invariance, plan, triage, whatif
- Improved baseline calculations
- Updated cass cache and correlation
- Enhanced correlation module: cache, causality, cocommit, correlator,
  explicit, file index, orphan, temporal, types
- Improved drift detection
- Enhanced export: Cloudflare, SQLite, wizard
- Better hooks and loader handling
- Improved metrics cache and timing
- Updated model types and recipe types
- Enhanced search index sync
- Improved test utilities: assertions, generator, proptest
- Major UI enhancements: cass session modal, context, flow matrix,
  graph tests, history, insights, integration tests, item tests,
  label dashboard/picker, markdown, theme, tree, velocity comparison,
  visuals
- Enhanced updater and topk utilities
- Improved watcher tests
- Updated workspace loader
- Enhanced E2E tests: common, correlation, graph navigation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
